summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced booking calendar features. All major functionality working correctly including DayDetailsModal, 3-state calendar display, slot selection with form pre-filling, and proper 24h booking messages.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal close button has overlay interception during automated testing
ui_bugs.note: Core functionality works, only automation issue with modal overlay

passed_tests: Calendar shows 3 states correctly: Free (white), Partially busy (amber), Fully booked (red)
Legend displays all 4 required states: Ausgewählt, Teilweise belegt, Voll belegt, Frei
Clicking partially busy day opens DayDetailsModal with 'Tagesübersicht' title
Modal shows existing bookings with time and event type (e.g., '14:00 - 18:00 Familienfeier')
Modal shows available time slots for partially busy days
Clicking available slot (08:00 - 12:00) correctly pre-fills booking form
Fully booked days show correct message: 'Dieser Tag ist für eine 24h-Buchung reserviert'
24h bookings display as 'Ganztägig (09:00-09:00)' with event type
Fully booked days show 'Keine freien Zeitfenster' section
Free days do not open modal (direct selection behavior)
Calendar navigation and date restrictions working correctly
User authentication and session management functional
